title: Parkio Daily Briefing for April 27, 2026
teaser: New Bluey merchandise arrives at Disney Parks. Plus Gary celebrates 40 years caring for EPCOT's gardens and landscapes.

rides.name: Space Mountain
rides.note: Low wait times on Sunday mornings

rides.name: Big Thunder Mountain Railroad
rides.note: Great time to ride during Food & Wine Festival

bignews.title: New Bluey Merchandise Arrives at Disney Parks
bignews.body: Bluey merchandise is now available at Disneyland Resort and coming soon to Walt Disney World Resort. The collection includes plush, apparel, accessories, and Create-Your-Own headbands. At Disneyland, items are available at Fantasy Faire Gifts and Fantasyland Theatre Valet. Disney World guests can find Bluey merchandise at Island Mercantile and Conservation Station ahead of the May 26 debut of Bluey's Wild World experience.

bignews.title: Bluey Merchandise Coming to Disney Store This Summer
bignews.body: Select items from the new Bluey merchandise collection will be available on DisneyStore.com starting this summer. The online selection will include hoodies, T-shirts, tumblers, water bottles, toys, puzzles, and figurine sets for fans who cannot visit the parks.

topstories.title: Cast Member Celebrates 40 Years Caring for EPCOT Gardens
topstories.body: Gary, who started as a gardener at EPCOT, now serves as Urban Forester leading arborist teams across Walt Disney World Resort. He has supported every EPCOT International Flower & Garden Festival since the first one in 1994, overseeing crane operations and large-scale topiary installations that bring the festival to life each year.

topstories.title: Bluey's Wild World Opens May 26 at Animal Kingdom
topstories.body: Disney's Animal Kingdom will debut Bluey's Wild World at Conservation Station on May 26. The new experience will allow guests to laugh, dance, and play with Bluey and Bingo. Themed merchandise is already available at Island Mercantile and Conservation Station.

topstories.title: EPCOT Flower & Garden Festival Continues
topstories.body: The EPCOT International Flower & Garden Festival is in full swing with elaborate topiaries, outdoor kitchens, and garden displays throughout the park. Gary and his horticulture team continue to maintain the festival's stunning landscapes and installations.

icymi.title: Bluey's Best Day Ever at Disneyland
icymi.body: Bluey's Best Day Ever continues at Fantasyland Theatre in Disneyland park with character meet-and-greets, interactive games, and themed food offerings including Pizza Girls Baked Potato and Poffertjes from Troubadour Tavern.

spotlight.title: Sunday is Perfect for Lower Wait Times
spotlight.body: Sunday mornings typically offer shorter wait times at both Magic Kingdom and Disneyland. Arrive early to maximize your ride time before afternoon crowds build. Check the app for real-time wait times throughout your visit.
